$comment: Reusable ratchet skeleton. Copy this dir, set name/domain/models, drop reference content into kb/ (then `ratchet index <dir>\kb`), and author action chains under flows/. Launch with `ratchet <this-dir>`. workdir defaults to this folder; flows/tools/kb/schemas/samples default under it - add a dir field only to point elsewhere. `requirements` below feed `ratchet doctor` - edit them to match your toolchain.
name: CHANGE_ME
domain: CHANGE_ME - one line: what this ratchet is for
